instructions.title: Publish existing creatives to the gallery
instructions.instruction:
PUBLISH CREATIVES TO THE GALLERY - small one-off task, do exactly this, then STOP. Do NOT create or touch any ads/campaigns.

GOAL: collect every creative asset URL already generated for PeningBot + PeningLab and publish them to creatives.json in the GitHub repo aqilrvsb/hermes-inbox, so the Creatives tab can display them.

STEP 1 - GATHER URLS: Read _shared/reports/launch.md. Also search _shared/ for any file containing peninglab/grsai/oaiusercontent/amazonaws asset URLs (.png .jpg .webp .mp4 .mov .webm). Collect ALL unique image/video URLs from the most recent launch. There should be ~12 (2 posters + 10 videos).

STEP 2 - BUILD JSON: Build an object:
{"updated":"<today's date>","items":[ {"brand":"peningbot"|"peninglab","slot":"PB-P"|"PB-V1".."PB-V5"|"PL-P"|"PL-V1".."PL-V5","type":"image"|"video","url":"<asset url>","headline":"<the paired headline>","primary":"<the paired primary text>"}, ... ]}
- Map each URL to its slot by order/section in launch.md. Posters (the 1:1 images) = PB-P / PL-P (type image). Videos = the V1..V5 of each brand (type video).
- Pair the headline/primary from the report copy for that slot. If you cannot determine headline/primary for an item, still include the item with url+brand+slot+type (those fields are enough).
- peningbot URLs -> brand peningbot; peninglab URLs -> brand peninglab. If the brand is unclear from the URL, use which section of launch.md it appeared under.

STEP 3 - PUBLISH to GitHub repo aqilrvsb/hermes-inbox, file path creatives.json, branch main, using the github MCP tool create_or_update_file (first get_file_contents on creatives.json to obtain its current sha, then create_or_update_file with that sha, the new content, message "publish creatives from launch"). The github MCP is authenticated already.

STEP 4 - CONFIRM: append one line to _shared/reports/launch.md: "Published N creatives to creatives.json on <date>." Then STOP. Do not do anything else.
